headline: Nintendo's newest WarioWare is a weirdo smartphone app
summary: Nintendo releases a new WarioWare title as a smartphone app. This marks a new direction after previous mobile game struggles. The app is described as a 'weirdo' experience.

headline: Microsoft 365 Copilot gets a speed boost and cleaner design
summary: Microsoft 365 Copilot receives a revamped design for improved aesthetics. The update claims to load twice as fast across devices. It also promises more reliable and structured AI responses.

headline: Amazon's last-gen Paperwhite is on sale for less than the entry-level Kindle
summary: The 2021 Kindle Paperwhite is on sale, making it cheaper than the entry-level Kindle. This older model remains a top e-reader due to its waterproof design. The deal is available at Woot until June 14th or supplies last.

headline: Motorola's last-gen Razr Ultra is almost half off
summary: The 2025 Motorola Razr Ultra, a flip foldable phone, is nearly half its original price. It's now available for $699.99 unlocked at Best Buy. This deal offers a more affordable entry into the foldable market.

headline: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 Leak May Reveal Early Access for Campaign
summary: A new leak suggests Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4. Players might get early access to the game's campaign mode. This could be prior to the full game's official release.

headline: The Walmart Exclusive Icon Blue PlayStation 5 DualSense Controller Is on Sale for the First Time
summary: The Walmart-exclusive Icon Blue PS5 DualSense controller is now on sale. This marks the first time this specific color variant has been discounted. Gamers can grab the distinctive blue controller at a reduced price.

headline: This $1,800 Power Lift Recliner and Massage Chair Is Just $380 During the Wayfair Memorial Day Sale
summary: A high-end power lift recliner and massage chair is heavily discounted. Originally priced at $1,800, it's now just $380. This significant deal is part of the Wayfair Memorial Day Sale.

headline: Rambo Prequel Gets Summer 2027 Release Date
summary: A new prequel film, 'John Rambo,' has been announced. The movie will explore the origins of the iconic character. It is slated for a summer 2027 release.

headline: Sturgeon says estranged husband betrayed and deceived her about embezzling SNP money
summary: Nicola Sturgeon claims her estranged husband, Peter Murrell, betrayed her. She alleges he deceived her regarding the embezzlement of SNP funds. Murrell recently pleaded guilty, leading Sturgeon to feel she didn't know the man she married.

headline: Opportunities shrinking for too many young people, says major report on 'lost generation'
summary: A new report warns of shrinking opportunities for young people. It forecasts 1.25 million 16-24 year olds will be out of work, education, or training by 2031. The report describes this demographic as a potential 'lost generation.'

headline: 'I've applied for more than 400 roles' - how young people are facing the job shortage
summary: Young people are struggling significantly to find employment. One individual reported applying for over 400 jobs without success. The BBC highlights personal stories detailing the challenges of the current job market.

headline: US and Iran 'very close' to deal but 'not there yet', Vance says
summary: US and Iran are reportedly 'very close' to an agreement. The potential deal involves a ceasefire extension, pending leadership approval. US officials indicate a framework has been agreed upon, but finalization is pending.
